title: justicia ensiflora
intro: Justicia ensiflora, also known as the sword-leafed justicia, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Justicia ensiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Justicia ensiflora can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oil in topical applications.
